text: Aaj ka pain, kal ka gain.
Tu consistent raha toh success pakki hai.
Ek din ya day one — choose kar.
Sapne bade hain, toh mehnat bhi badi karni padegi.
Topper banne ka plan hai ya bas soch raha hai?
Mehnat itni shanti se karo ki safalta shor macha de.
Thoda aur padh le bhai, manzil paas hi hai.
Hard work beats talent when talent doesn’t work hard.
Kismat se zyada apni mehnat par bharosa rakh.
Khud par vishwas rakh, tu kar sakta hai!
Har chota badlav ek badi kamyabi ka hissa hota hai.
Jab tak todenge nahi, tab tak chodenge nahi!
Duniya ki fikar mat kar, apne lakshya par dhyan de.
Subah uthte hi apna maqsad yaad kar, phir dekh din kaisa jata hai.
Abhi jo mehnat karega, wahi kal aish karega.
Discipline boring hota hai, par result sexy hota hai.
Phone side me rakh aur zindagi set kar.
Kal se nahi, aaj se start kar.
Focus level: Arjun ki nazar fish ki aankh par.
Motivation starts you off, Discipline keeps you going.
Time pass karna band kar, future tere decisions ka wait kar raha hai.
Roz ka thoda-thoda effort, ek din bada result dega.
Aaj nahi padha toh kal regret karega.
Excuses don't get results. Action does.
Apne din ko plan kar, varna din tujhe plan kar lega.
Consistency is the key to mastering anything.
Success is just discipline practiced every day.
Agar kuch alag karna hai, toh alag aadat dalni padegi.
Choti choti aadatain bada asar dikhati hain.
Dhyan bhatkane wali cheezon se door raho!
Tu padhega nahi toh Google bhi help nahi karega.
Padhai kar le, varna Insta walo ki shaadi dekhta reh jayega.
Books utha le bhai, reels se ghar nahi chalta.
Tere dost aage nikal jayenge, tu yahi memes bhejta reh jayega.
Bhai tu padhne baith, baaki dukh baad me discuss karenge.
Jab result aayega, tab relatives nahi AI answer dega kya?
Degree chahiye ya reels ka diamond play button?
Maa baap ki expectations tere net pack se jyada badi hain.
Agar padhai nahi ki toh shadi bhi arrange wale karwa denge. Choice is yours.
Padh le bhai, crush bhi topper pe line marti hai.
Wifi band kar, dimag chalu kar.
Bohot reels dekh li, ab thodi padhai bhi dekh le meri jaan.
Aadha syllabus baaki hai aur tu web series ke chakkar me hai?
Padhai kabhi dhoka nahi deti, sirf GPA kam aata hai.
Tujhe dekh kar Netflix bhi poonch raha hai: "Are you still watching?"
Padh le bhai, warna future tujhe ignore karega.
Sochne se crorepathi nahi bante, kaam karna padta hai.
Dost ki placement dekh kar rona hai ya khud placement leni hai?
Garibi sabse bada motivation hai, tujhe aur kya chahiye?
Tera screen time tere marks se zyada hai. Sharam kar.
Duniya tere aasuon pe hasegi, success par taliyan bajayegi. Decide today.
Success chahiye toh neend ko compromise karna seekh.
Raat bhar jaag kar chating karega toh career bhi chatting me nikal jayega.
Agar aaj neend pyaari hai, toh kal reality bhayankar hogi.
Competition bahut tight hai, aur tu light le raha hai.
Jo aisi raato me sote hain, wo aam zindagi rote hain.
Middle class log sote nahi, sapne poore karte hain.
Kal kare so aaj kar, aaj kare so ab. Warna degree latak jayegi tab!
Agar aaj sacrifice nahi karega, toh kal reality tujhe sacrifice kar degi.
Aise hi chalta raha toh placement wale din paani serve karega.
